Event: The Hunting Adventure
Event Date: 01/07/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: M18


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Gray Wolf Mace

When attacking, has a 30-33% chance of stunning an enemy for 2,5 sec.
All frightened enemies take physical damage equal to 10% of their max health for every second they are frightened.

Once in a while, the unit scares 3 random enemies for 4 sec and deals pure damage to them equal to 20% of the unit's max health.

Requirements: 98-100
